---
title: "Lab 4a: Drive-Time and Network Access to Care"
subtitle: "Intro GIS for Public Health · ArcGIS Online track · Day 4"
---

::: {.lab-download}
[Download this lab (Word)](downloads/Lab04a_NetworkAccess_ArcGISOnline_PH.docx){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm download="Lab04a_NetworkAccess_ArcGISOnline_PH.docx"}
[ArcGIS Pro version (Word)](downloads/Lab04a_NetworkAnalysis_ArcGISPro_PH.docx){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm download="Lab04a_NetworkAnalysis_ArcGISPro_PH.docx"}
:::

{{< include _lab4a-online.md >}}
